motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
```python
class KthLargest:

    def __init__(self, k: int, nums: List[int]):
        self.k = k
        self.nums = sorted(nums)

    def add(self, val: int) -> int:
        self.nums.append(val)
        self.nums.sort(reverse=True)
        return self.nums[self.k-1]

```
efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The KthLargest class maintains a sorted list of test scores and returns the kth highest score after a new score has been submitted. The add method appends the new score to the list and sorts it in descending order to find the kth highest score.
